texto: ... when people love you, they show up. Sometimes that means that they get to bail you out of trouble. It's not bad when that happens; it just means that you return the obligation when you get the chance. You be a guy who is present instead of a fuck-up.
explicacao: Citação de Jeremy Bushnell sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “... when people love you, they show up. Sometimes that means that they get to bail you out of tro…” articula amizade, love, trouble em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como love e trouble.

frase_original: ... when people love you, they show up. Sometimes that means that they get to bail you out of trouble. It's not bad when that happens; it just means that you return the obligation when you get the chance. You be a guy who is present instead of a fuck-up.
